title: HeyClaude MCP Server - Access HeyClaude via MCP
author: HeyClaude Team
detailMarkdown:
# HeyClaude MCP Server - Access HeyClaude via MCP

Access the complete HeyClaude directory through HeyClaude's official MCP server. Search prompts, agents, MCP servers, rules, commands, and more directly from Claude Desktop, Cursor, or any MCP client.

## Install
```bash
claude mcp add --transport http heyclaude-mcp https://mcp.heyclau.de/mcp && claude mcp list
```

## Config
```json
{
  "heyclaude-mcp": {
    "url": "https://mcp.heyclau.de/mcp",
    "oauth": {
      "scopes": [
        "mcp:tools"
      ],
      "resource": "https://mcp.heyclau.de/mcp",
      "tokenEndpoint": "https://hgtjdifxfapoltfflowc.supabase.co/auth/v1/token",
      "authorizationEndpoint": "https://mcp.heyclau.de/oauth/authorize"
    },
    "transport": "http"
  }
}
```

## Usage
claude mcp add --transport http heyclaude-mcp https://mcp.heyclau.de/mcp && claude mcp list
